feat.name: Heart of Earth
feat.text: The earth parts to allow you passage. You gain a burrow Speed of 15 feet. While burrowing, your tremorsense becomes precise up to 15 feet. When you Burrow, you can choose to leave behind a tunnel of your size or smaller for others to traverse through.

traits.name: Dragonblood
traits.text: A creature with this trait has the dragonblood versatile heritage. These creatures are born of draconic lineage and often have draconic appearances.
